X/X/Suttanipātaṭṭhakathā/262.text: Bālasevanapaccayabhayānaṁ parittāṇena (Sī), bālasevanapaccayā bhayādiparittāṇena (Syā), bālasevanapaccayā uppannabhayādīnaṁ parittāṇena (Ka)

X/X/Suttanipātaṭṭhakathā/265.text: Attano jātā puttāpi (Sī), attano jātaputtāpi (Syā, Ka)

ParamatthajotikāyaKhuddakaṭṭhakathāya/X/.text: Sampuṇṇattā sāṅgaṇo puggalo so dubbisodho hi cirakālaṁ (Sī), sampuṇṇattā sampuṇṇo sabbaso dubbisodho aticirakālaṁ (Ka)

variants.reading: Sampuṇṇattā sāṅgaṇo puggalo so dubbisodho hi cirakālaṁ

ParamatthajotikāyaKhuddakaṭṭhakathāya/X/.text: Sampuṇṇattā sāṅgaṇo puggalo so dubbisodho hi cirakālaṁ (Sī), sampuṇṇattā sampuṇṇo sabbaso dubbisodho aticirakālaṁ (Ka)

variants.reading: Sampuṇṇattā sāṅgaṇo puggalo so dubbisodho hi cirakālaṁ

ParamatthajotikāyaKhuddakaṭṭhakathāya/X/.text: Yātrāyāgassetaṁ (Sī), sātrāyāgassetaṁ (Syā); Aṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 302; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 194; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 134 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.
Āmaṁ pattanti āmaṁ mattikābhājanaṁ (Sī), āmapakkanti āmamattikābhājanaṁ (Syā)
Parovarāti parā avarā (Sī), paroparāti parā parā (Syā)
Idaṁ vohāramajānantā (Syā), idamajānantā (Sī, Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 300. piṭṭhe ca)
Idaṁ vohāramajānantā (Syā), idamajānantā (Sī, Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 300. piṭṭhe ca)

ParamatthajotikāyaKhuddakaṭṭhakathāya/Pā.text: Māhissatinti māhissatināmikaṁ purimanagaranti (Sī), puraṁ māhissatinti māhissatināmikaṁ puraṁ nagaranti (Syā)

ParamatthajotikāyaKhuddakaṭṭhakathāya/X/.text: Parovarānīti parāni ca avarāni ca (Sī), paroparānīti parāni ca oparāni ca (?)
